title: Dark Hazard
writer: Ralph Block, Brown Holmes, W.R. Burnett
actors: Edward G. Robinson, Genevieve Tobin, Glenda Farrell
plot: Jim is a compulsive gambler. He meets Marge at a boarding house and they get married. His gambling causes problems. When he runs into old flame Valerie, Marge leaves him. After a few years he returns, but she is now in love with o...
